title: Catalystic UI — playground consequential contract
description: A minimal catalog that ENFORCES only the trust-critical (consequential) components. Every other component the renderer supports is passed through untouched (passUnknown). Consequential components must match this contract exactly — malformed or reworded ones are rejected, never repaired.

allOf.description: REQUIRED for any pay / transfer / confirm / irreversible action. Use this dedicated component — never build a confirmation from a plain Button, and never reword or restructure it.
REQUIRED for currency amount entry in payment / transfer flows. Never compose from a plain Input.
